nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package entry point that re-exports the FastAPI app instance from main.py for module consumers.

nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI application factory — configures CORS, GZip, middleware stack, mounts static files, and registers all API routers under /api prefix.

nodes.name: lifespan
nodes.summary: Application lifespan handler that creates data directories, initializes DB tables, sets up FTS5 search, seeds dictionaries, and seeds default watermark presets on startup.

nodes.name: health_check
nodes.summary: Health check endpoint returning application name and version.

nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic-based application settings loaded from .env file and environment variables, covering database, server, CORS, and external API keys.

nodes.name: Settings
nodes.summary: Pydantic BaseSettings class defining all application configuration fields with environment variable support.

nodes.name: database.py
nodes.summary: SQLAlchemy engine and session factory setup with SQLite PRAGMA optimizations for WAL mode, foreign keys, and cache tuning.

nodes.name: set_sqlite_pragma
nodes.summary: SQLAlchemy event listener that configures SQLite PRAGMA directives for WAL journal mode, synchronous normalization, foreign keys, and cache size.

nodes.name: get_db
nodes.summary: FastAPI dependency that yields a SQLAlchemy session and guarantees cleanup on completion.

nodes.name: deps.py
nodes.summary: Shared FastAPI dependencies for authentication — provides token verification, user lookup, and bearer token extraction with HMAC-signed JWT support.

nodes.name: _deb64
nodes.summary: Base64 URL-safe decoder with padding fix, used to decode JWT payload segments.

nodes.name: _sign
nodes.summary: Creates HMAC-SHA256 signature for JWT token validation.

nodes.name: _verify_token
nodes.summary: Verifies HMAC-signed JWT tokens, checks blacklist, validates expiry, and decodes the subject (user_id) claim.

nodes.name: get_current_user_id
nodes.summary: FastAPI header dependency that extracts and verifies the current user ID from Authorization Bearer token, falling back to local mode.

nodes.name: get_current_user
nodes.summary: FastAPI dependency that returns the authenticated UserModel or None for unauthenticated/demo mode.

nodes.name: require_auth
nodes.summary: FastAPI dependency that enforces authentication and returns the user_id string.

nodes.name: mcp_server.py
nodes.summary: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server implementing HTTP JSON-RPC 2.0 transport with 7 tools for product data access, revenue summary, and ERP feed conversions.

nodes.name: verify_mcp_api_key
nodes.summary: Validates MCP API key from Authorization header against predefined key map.

nodes.name: check_rate_limit
nodes.summary: Sliding-window rate limiter using in-memory store with thread-safe lock, 60-second window.

nodes.name: _handle_tools_list
nodes.summary: Returns MCP tools/list response with all 7 tool definitions.

nodes.name: _handle_tools_call
nodes.summary: Routes MCP tools/call requests to the appropriate handler function by tool name.

nodes.name: _tool_list_products
nodes.summary: Lists products from the database with optional category and status filtering.

nodes.name: _tool_get_product
nodes.summary: Retrieves detailed product information including publishings by product ID.

nodes.name: _tool_search_products
nodes.summary: Searches products by keyword across title, description, and category fields using ILIKE.

nodes.name: _tool_get_product_certificate
nodes.summary: Retrieves blockchain/notary certificate information for a product by work ID.

nodes.name: _tool_get_verified_mark
nodes.summary: Returns verified badge QR code and verification page for a product.

nodes.name: _tool_get_revenue_summary
nodes.summary: Aggregates revenue data by period, platform, and monthly trends.

nodes.name: _tool_get_product_feed
nodes.summary: Exports product feed in various formats: universal, Google, Shopify, WangDianTong, WanLiNiu, JuShuiTan.

nodes.name: _convert_to_wangdiantong
nodes.summary: Converts standard product feed to WangDianTong ERP goods import JSON format.

nodes.name: _convert_to_jushuitan
nodes.summary: Converts standard product feed to JuShuiTan ERP product import JSON format.

nodes.name: _convert_to_wanliuniu
nodes.summary: Converts standard product feed to WanLiNiu (Hupun) ERP product import JSON format.

nodes.name: mcp_endpoint
nodes.summary: MCP JSON-RPC 2.0 HTTP POST endpoint supporting initialize, tools/list, tools/call, and notifications/initialized methods.

nodes.name: mcp_info
nodes.summary: MCP server discovery endpoint returning protocol version, tool count, and server info.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Middleware package barrel file exporting LoggingMiddleware and re-organizing middleware imports.

nodes.name: audit.py
nodes.summary: Audit logging middleware that records all non-GET requests to the audit_logs table.

nodes.name: AuditMiddleware
nodes.summary: Starlette middleware that logs all write operations (non-GET) with action, status code, and IP to the audit_logs database table.

nodes.name: logging.py
nodes.summary: Request logging middleware that records HTTP method, path, status code, and response duration using the oristudio logger.

nodes.name: LoggingMiddleware
nodes.summary: Starlette middleware that logs request method, URL path, response status, and duration for each incoming HTTP request.

nodes.name: rate_limit.py
nodes.summary: Sliding-window rate limiting middleware based on client IP, with per-route exclusions for static files, health checks, and MCP endpoints.

nodes.name: RateLimitMiddleware
nodes.summary: IP-based sliding window rate limiter configurable via max_requests and window_seconds parameters, with test-disable support and path-based exemptions.

nodes.name: common.py
nodes.summary: Shared Pydantic response models including generic ApiResponse, PaginatedResponse, ErrorResponse, and SuccessResponse for all API endpoints.

nodes.name: ApiResponse
nodes.summary: Generic Pydantic response envelope with success flag, message, and typed data field.

nodes.name: PaginatedResponse
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for paginated API responses with items, total, page, page_size, and total_pages.

nodes.name: PaginationParams
nodes.summary: Query parameter model for page and page_size with sensible defaults.

nodes.name: DashboardStats
nodes.summary: Pydantic model representing dashboard statistics: works count, notarized count, alerts, and revenue.

nodes.name: ErrorResponse
nodes.summary: Error response model with success=false, message, and optional detail field.

nodes.name: SuccessResponse
nodes.summary: Minimal success response model with success flag and message.

nodes.name: system.py
nodes.summary: System management ORM models including settings, audit logs, backups, unified dictionary center, user accounts with OAuth providers, notifications, plugins, email verification, password reset, and disclaimers.

nodes.name: SystemSetting
nodes.summary: Key-value store for system settings with category, description, and public visibility flags.

nodes.name: AuditLog
nodes.summary: Audit log table tracking user actions with indexed fields for action, user, and created_at.

nodes.name: BackupRecord
nodes.summary: Database backup records tracking path, size, type, encryption status, and cron schedules.

nodes.name: DictionaryGroup
nodes.summary: Dictionary grouping table for the unified dictionary data center with one-to-many relationship to DictionaryItem.

nodes.name: DictionaryItem
nodes.summary: Dictionary item entries belonging to a group, with extra JSON metadata and sort ordering.

nodes.name: User
nodes.summary: Central user account model supporting local, Google, WeChat, Douyin OAuth logins, creator type, and notification preferences.

nodes.name: UserLoginHistory
nodes.summary: Tracks user login events with provider, IP, and success status.

nodes.name: Notification
nodes.summary: System notification messages with support for WebSocket, in-app, email, and WeChat template channels.

nodes.name: Plugin
nodes.summary: Plugin registration table with hooks, config, entry point, and priority for the plugin framework.

nodes.name: EmailVerification
nodes.summary: Email verification code records with expiration and verification status.

nodes.name: PasswordReset
nodes.summary: Password reset token records with expiration and usage tracking.

nodes.name: Disclaimer
nodes.summary: Disclaimers and legal notices definition table with trigger pages and display modes.

nodes.name: DisclaimerAcceptance
nodes.summary: Records user acceptance of specific disclaimers with context and version.

nodes.name: auth.py
nodes.summary: Authentication API with 15 endpoints for user registration, login, profile management, OAuth stubs (Google/WeChat/Douyin), third-party account binding, session management, and v3 onboarding.

nodes.name: register
nodes.summary: User registration endpoint — migrates legacy JSON users to SQLite, creates account, issues JWT token.

nodes.name: login
nodes.summary: User login with email/password, updates login stats, creates login history record, and issues JWT token.

nodes.name: get_current_user
nodes.summary: Returns current logged-in user info, supporting both JWT tokens and legacy JSON file fallback.

nodes.name: update_user_profile
nodes.summary: Authenticated PATCH endpoint for updating username, avatar_url, and phone.

nodes.name: complete_onboarding
nodes.summary: Completes v3 onboarding by persisting creator_type, marking onboarding done, and setting default publish platforms.

nodes.name: _migrate_json_users
nodes.summary: Migrates users from legacy data/config/users.json file to SQLite users table with idempotent behavior.

nodes.name: _create_token
nodes.summary: Creates HMAC-signed JWT-like tokens with 30-day expiry for authentication.

nodes.name: commission.py
nodes.summary: Commission management API providing CRUD for projects, orders, and message threads for freelance work tracking.

nodes.name: factory.py
nodes.summary: Factory/RFQ API for manufacturing workflow — supports inquiry requests, sample management, and quality inspection reports.

nodes.name: metadata_templates.py
nodes.summary: Metadata template API for IPTC/EXIF/CC field templates with CRUD operations, field management, and template application to works.

nodes.name: seed_default_templates
nodes.summary: Idempotent initializer that seeds IPTC Core, EXIF Camera, and Creative Commons template definitions.

nodes.name: subscription.py
nodes.summary: Subscription tier and subscriber management API with CRUD for tiers, subscription activation/cancellation with period handling.

nodes.name: subtitle.py
nodes.summary: Subtitle management API with CRUD for subtitles and a project file format registry for supported extensions.

nodes.name: system.py
nodes.summary: Large system management router with 2468 lines covering settings, backups, dictionary center, notifications, storage health, email/wechat notifications, plugin framework, and danger zone operations.

nodes.name: video_fingerprint.py
nodes.summary: Video fingerprinting API with CRUD for fingerprint configurations (algorithm, threshold) and frame-level fingerprint records.

nodes.name: watermark.py
nodes.summary: Watermark preset management API with CRUD for presets, config validation, preview generation, and watermark application to works.

nodes.name: work_variants.py
nodes.summary: Work variant group API for managing aspect ratio variations (16:9, 9:16, 1:1, etc.) of creative works with Pydantic-validated request models.

nodes.name: _calc_aspect_ratio
nodes.summary: Calculates simplified aspect ratio from width and height using GCD reduction.

nodes.name: generate_variants
nodes.summary: Generates standard aspect ratio variants (16:9, 9:16, 1:1, 4:3, etc.) for a work at a base resolution of 1920px.

nodes.name: dict_seed.py
nodes.summary: Seed data service initializing 60+ dictionary groups covering file types, notary platforms, IP types, POD platforms, order statuses, currencies, countries, and more. Also includes design category mappings for AI adaptation.

nodes.name: seed_dictionaries
nodes.summary: Idempotent dictionary seed initializer that creates DictionaryGroup and DictionaryItem records from the SEED_DATA constant.

nodes.name: watermark_service.py
nodes.summary: Watermark service providing config validation for text/image/tiled watermarks, preview generation, and watermark application (currently MVP stub using file copy).

nodes.name: validate_config
nodes.summary: Validates watermark config including type, position, opacity, and type-specific requirements (text content, image URL, tile URL).

nodes.name: generate_watermark_preview
nodes.summary: Generates watermark preview by copying source image to a thumbnails directory as MVP placeholder.

nodes.name: apply_watermark
nodes.summary: Applies watermark to an image file — currently MVP stub copying the file to the output path.
